landing.description: Experience unique sessions combining guided meditation, gentle music, and spiritual guidance for deep inner reconnection.

home.title: Welcome, {name}.

about_page.title: Our History
about_page.subtitle: A bridge between the visible and the invisible, a dance between body and soul.

story.title: The Tale of Corps et Âmes
story.p1: Corps et Âmes was born from a vision: to create a sacred space where each individual can explore the depths of their being, a sanctuary where physical well-being and the flourishing of the soul converge. Founded by enthusiasts of spirituality, personal development, and holistic therapies, our center is more than just a platform; it is a vibrant community.
story.p2: Our mission is to accompany you on your life path, offering tools, knowledge, and experiences that resonate with your essence. We believe in an integrated approach, where every practice, treatment, and training is an invitation to reconnect with your inner wisdom and activate your full potential.

founder.title: The Founder
founder.name: Mickaël 'Micka' Réault
founder.bio: Creator of the Irisphère Harmonia method and founder of Corps et Âmes, Mickaël is an explorer of consciousness, a 'Body & Soul Developer'. His passion is to guide curious souls through inner journeys, using sound, energy, and intuition to unlock the doors of perception and catalyze profound transformations. His approach is a unique blend of ancestral techniques and contemporary practices, always within a benevolent and secure framework.

authenticity.title: Authenticity
authenticity.description: We present ourselves as we are, with open hearts and pure intentions.

benevolence.title: Benevolence
benevolence.description: Every interaction is marked by respect, compassion, and sincere listening.

community.title: Community
community.description: We weave strong bonds, creating a support and sharing network where everyone feels welcome.

exploration.title: Exploration
exploration.description: We encourage curiosity, continuous learning, and the audacity to venture beyond the beaten path.

soins_page.title: Our Treatments
soins_page.intro: Discover all our 100% online treatments. Enjoy the benefits of your Holistic Institute and the expertise of experienced practitioners directly from the comfort of your home.

irisphere-harmonia.title: Irisphere Harmonia (Signature Treatment)
irisphere-harmonia.intro: Irisphere Harmonia is an exclusive Signature Treatment by Corps et Âmes, partly based on the methods of Innerdance - Kundalini Activation. The principle is simple: A series of scrupulously selected and energetically modified music tracks are played at high volume (headphones strongly recommended) to induce a state of light trance. They are programmed to take you on a safe journey through different phases and stages to cleanse and connect all parts of your Being. The protocol has been studied and refined to include dimensions of mediumship and defined intentions. Benefit from private or group sessions, supervised by the creator of the method in person, who will be assisted by other facilitators for large groups.

guidances.title: Guidance Sessions
guidances.intro: Book your 100% online guidance session: Choose between a card and oracle reading, a witch's rune casting, or a psycho-energetic session with a wellness professional specialized in these areas.

energetic-treatments.title: Energetic Healings
energetic-treatments.intro: Need a little boost, an alignment, a break from the daily hustle? Our practitioners will be delighted to welcome you from your home in a 100% online setting for an intuitive energetic healing session tailored to your current needs.

dialogue-space.title: Dialogue Space
dialogue-space.intro: A privileged space for speaking and listening. Whether you have specific questions about our training programs, need advice on choosing the most suitable treatment for your needs, or simply want a live exchange before you commit, this space is yours. An open-hearted dialogue to enlighten your path.

combined-treatments.title: Combined Treatments
combined-treatments.intro: Book your combined session, group our services into a single appointment to get up to 5 hours of continuous well-being in one day.

soins_page.no_soins: No treatments available at the moment.
